organization.business_model: TransWest provides regional freight consolidation, warehouse storage, and last-mile delivery services for e-commerce and manufacturing clients across the Midwest.

past_incidents.outcome: Employee clicked malicious link, triggering ransomware that encrypted 15% of files; resolved via offline backups and 3-week system rebuild
Cloud backup failure during peak season caused 72-hour data loss; resolved by renegotiating SLAs with AWS and deploying on-prem backup servers

organization.regulatory_timeline: SOC 2 Type II audit due Q2 2026, Indiana state privacy law compliance review scheduled Q4 2026
organization.growth_trajectory: Stable - Maintaining current market share through optimized route planning and warehouse automation

governance_and_policy.policy_enforcement: Ad-hoc with inconsistent documentation; IT Manager handles most enforcement manually

stakeholders.name: Martha L. Reynolds
stakeholders.signature_quote: We're not a tech company - we move goods, not data.
stakeholders.hidden_info: Knows the CFO has been quietly negotiating with a competitor for a potential acquisition
stakeholders.relationship_conflicts: Blames IT Manager for 2023 service outage, refuses to allocate additional budget for security

stakeholders.name: James T. Nguyen
stakeholders.signature_quote: If security slows down our trucks, we lose money. Period.
stakeholders.hidden_info: Has been secretly using a third-party inventory tracking app that bypasses company systems
stakeholders.shadow_it_knowledge: Uses 'QuickTrack' app for real-time inventory updates
stakeholders.relationship_conflicts: Has ongoing tension with IT Manager over 2023 outage

stakeholders.name: Emily R. Carter
likely_pushback: Prioritizing short-term savings over long-term security
stakeholders.signature_quote: I'd rather pay a fine than spend money on unproven security measures.
stakeholders.hidden_info: Has been secretly negotiating with a third-party auditor to delay SOC 2 compliance
stakeholders.relationship_conflicts: Has a conflict with CEO over potential acquisition rumors

stakeholders.name: David K. Patel
likely_pushback: Lack of executive support for security upgrades
stakeholders.signature_quote: We're constantly playing catch-up with the security landscape.
stakeholders.hidden_info: Knows the backup server failed silently for 3 months but hasn't reported it
stakeholders.relationship_conflicts: Blamed by COO for 2023 outage, resists budget increases

stakeholders.name: Linda M. Torres
stakeholders.signature_quote: I'd rather train employees than lock them out of systems.
stakeholders.hidden_info: Knows several warehouse staff use personal cloud storage for client files
stakeholders.shadow_it_knowledge: Employees use Google Drive for file sharing
stakeholders.relationship_conflicts: Has conflict with IT Manager over lack of training resources

stakeholders.name: Robert A. Kim
likely_pushback: Security measures slowing down customer onboarding
stakeholders.signature_quote: If security slows down our sales, we lose customers.
stakeholders.hidden_info: Knows the customer portal has unresolved vulnerabilities but hasn't reported them
stakeholders.relationship_conflicts: Has conflict with IT Manager over portal performance

stakeholders.name: Sarah J. Lee
stakeholders.signature_quote: I don't care about security if it slows down my team.
stakeholders.hidden_info: Knows the warehouse's automated systems have unpatched vulnerabilities
stakeholders.relationship_conflicts: Has conflict with IT Manager over system updates

vendor_risk.data_shared: Backup storage and S3 object storage

known_unknowns: No endpoint detection and response (EDR) tools
Lack of formal incident response plan
Unclear data retention policies for legacy systems
deliberate_weaknesses: No MFA enforced for on-premises administrative accounts
Unencrypted backups stored on local NAS devices
No endpoint encryption for mobile devices
Lack of network segmentation between departments
No regular security awareness training for staff

rules.comment: SSH access to firewall from any IP (intentional weakness)
Internal traffic between Corp LAN and Server VLAN
RDP access from Management VLAN to Server VLAN (no MFA required)
SMB file sharing between Corp LAN and Server VLAN
VPN users can access Corp LAN (split tunneling enabled)

deliberate_weaknesses: Allow SSH access to firewall from any IP without authentication
Allow RDP access from Management VLAN without MFA
No restriction on SMB traffic between Corp LAN and Server VLAN
VPN split tunneling enabled allowing access to internal resources from external networks
Allow SSH access to firewall from any IP without authentication
Allow RDP access from Management VLAN without MFA
No restriction on SMB traffic between Corp LAN and Server VLAN
VPN split tunneling enabled allowing access to internal resources from external networks

scenarios.initial_vector: Spearphishing email with malicious attachment targeting HR workstation

attack_path.action: Deliver phishing email with malicious attachment to hr-ws-01 (10.0.1.12)
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for unusual email traffic patterns or attachment types

attack_path.action: Execute payload via PowerShell to establish initial foothold
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect PowerShell command-line activity with suspicious parameters

attack_path.action: Establish persistence via scheduled task on hr-ws-01
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for unauthorized scheduled task creation

attack_path.action: Lateral movement via SMB to file-server-01 (10.0.2.20)
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect anomalous SMB traffic between Corp LAN and Server VLAN

attack_path.action: Privilege escalation using stolen credentials via LSASS memory dumping
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for LSASS memory access patterns

attack_path.action: Deploy ransomware payload to encrypt files on file-server-01
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect unusual file encryption activity

attack_path.action: Exfiltrate data via HTTP to external server
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for outbound HTTP traffic to unknown domains

scenarios.expected_impact: Ransomware encryption of critical files and data exfiltration

scenarios.initial_vector: Phishing attack targeting admin credentials via compromised vendor portal

attack_path.action: Phishing email sent to admin user with fake vendor portal login page
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for phishing email traffic patterns

attack_path.action: Credential theft via fake login page submission
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect login attempts from unusual locations

attack_path.action: Access domain controller via RDP from Management VLAN (10.0.6.0/24)
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for RDP sessions without MFA

attack_path.action: Create backdoor using remote access tool on domain controller
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect unauthorized remote access tool usage

attack_path.action: Deploy malware to compromise domain controller
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for unusual PowerShell activity

attack_path.action: Lateral movement to backup server (10.0.2.25) via SMB
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect anomalous SMB traffic

attack_path.action: Exfiltrate sensitive data via encrypted channel
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for encrypted data exfiltration

scenarios.expected_impact: Compromise of domain controller and data exfiltration

scenarios.initial_vector: Exploitation of exposed RDP on backup server via Management VLAN

attack_path.action: Brute-force RDP login attempt on backup-server (10.0.2.25)
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for failed RDP login attempts

attack_path.action: Establish RDP session without MFA
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect RDP sessions from Management VLAN

attack_path.action: Deploy malware to compromise backup server
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for unusual PowerShell activity

attack_path.action: Lateral movement to file-server-01 (10.0.2.20) via SMB
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect anomalous SMB traffic

attack_path.action: Privilege escalation using stolen credentials via LSASS memory dumping
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for LSASS memory access patterns

attack_path.action: Deploy ransomware payload to encrypt files on file-server-01
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Detect unusual file encryption activity

attack_path.action: Exfiltrate data via HTTP to external server
attack_path.detection_opportunity: Monitor for outbound HTTP traffic to unknown domains

scenarios.expected_impact: Ransomware encryption of critical files and data exfiltration
